docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUN-19-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GIM, MINJI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIVANCO, MONICA $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,030.00, DEFENDANT IS FOUND TO HAVE ALSO ACTED IN BAD FAITH FOR FAILING TO RETURN THE $1,000.00 SECURITY DEPOSIT WHEN PLAINTIFF MOVED OUT ON 8-11-18 AND TO DATE HAS NOT MADE ANY RETURN OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY GIM, MINJI AS TO DEFENDANT VIVANCO, MONICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-05-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) - GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER (FOR SEP-25-2020 HEARING DATE) RETURNED. SENT TO: PLAINTIFF GIM. (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 SERVED MAR-03-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VIVANCO, MONICA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-25-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF MINJI GIM IS PRESENT VIA COURTCALL. DEFENDANT MONICA VIVANCO IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) - FILED BY PLAINTIFF GIM, MINJI

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-19-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-25-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2021 ORDERED DESTROYED
